instruction:
Apply the exact harbor patch: sail-main, buoy-red-stripe, cabin-window, stray-pier-rope, mast width, rope-coil path, and buoy-green position all need local repairs.

Patch:
- buoy-green.cx: 172 -> 184
- buoy-green.cy: 116 -> 112
- rope-coil.d: "M48 82 C58 70 72 76 70 88 C68 100 50 94 52 84 C54 76 64 78 66 88" -> "M48 82 C58 72 70 74 70 84 C70 94 54 96 50 88 C46 80 60 78 62 86"
- mast.stroke-width: 6 -> 3
- remove stray-pier-rope
- cabin-window.x: 106 -> 114
- cabin-window.y: 70 -> 67
- buoy-red-stripe.fill: "#22c55e" -> "#ef4444"
- sail-main.points: [[144.66666666666669,30],[116.66666666666669,76],[144.66666666666669,76]] -> [[126,30],[154,76],[126,76]]
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#f5fbff" />
  <rect id="sky" fill="#cbd5e1" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" />
  <rect id="water" fill="#0f766e" x="0" y="70" width="220" height="70" />
  <line id="horizon" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="2" x1="0" y1="70" x2="220" y2="70" />
  <circle id="sun" fill="#fde047" cx="190" cy="22" r="12" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-left" fill="#ffffff" cx="36" cy="26" rx="18" ry="7" />
  <ellipse id="cloud-right" fill="#ffffff" cx="56" cy="25" rx="14" ry="6" />
  <rect id="pier-deck" fill="#92400e" x="0" y="88" width="72" height="10" />
  <path id="rope-coil" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" d="M48 82 C58 70 72 76 70 88 C68 100 50 94 52 84 C54 76 64 78 66 88" />
  <line id="pier-leg-1" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="16" y1="96" x2="13" y2="132" />
  <line id="pier-leg-2" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="4" x1="56" y1="96" x2="60" y2="132" />
  <polygon id="boat-hull" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="84,84 158,84 146,104 96,104" />
  <rect id="boat-cabin" fill="#e2e8f0" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="106" y="62" width="30" height="20" />
  <rect id="cabin-window" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="106" y="70" width="14" height="8" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="6" x1="126" y1="84" x2="126" y2="26" />
  <polygon id="sail-main" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="144.66666666666669,30 116.66666666666669,76 144.66666666666669,76" />
  <polygon id="sail-small" fill="#94a3b8" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="124,34 100,76 124,76" />
  <polygon id="flag" fill="#0284c7" points="126,25 140,29 126,33" />
  <polygon id="lighthouse-body" fill="#e5e7eb" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" points="176,82 206,82 200,28 182,28" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-1" fill="#334155" x="181" y="48" width="20" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-stripe-2" fill="#334155" x="179" y="64" width="24" height="7" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-cap" fill="#0f172a" x="180" y="22" width="22" height="8" />
  <rect id="lighthouse-window" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.7" x="188" y="34" width="6" height="8" />
  <polygon id="light-beam" fill="#fde68a" opacity="0.45" points="180,30 132,18 132,42" />
  <circle id="buoy-red" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="42" cy="112" r="8" />
  <rect id="buoy-red-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="35" y="110" width="14" height="4" />
  <circle id="buoy-green" fill="#f8fafc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="172" cy="116" r="7" />
  <rect id="buoy-green-stripe" fill="#22c55e" x="178" y="110" width="12" height="4" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="6,122 22,118 38,122 54,118 70,122" />
  <path id="harbor-wave-long" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" d="M82 118 C98 112 112 124 128 118 S158 112 174 118" />
  <polyline id="wave-2" fill="none" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="2" points="128,120 146,116 164,120 182,116 200,120" />
  <rect id="crate-left" fill="#a16207" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="12" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <rect id="crate-right" fill="#b45309" stroke="#451a03" stroke-width="1" x="28" y="76" width="14" height="12" />
  <ellipse id="skin-19-thunder-cloud-a" fill="#64748b" opacity="0.9" cx="88" cy="28" rx="39" ry="18" />

  <polygon id="skin-19-thunder-bolt" fill="#fde047" opacity="0.95" points="120,48 100,92 124,82 108,132 151,68 128,76" />

  <ellipse id="identity-19-storm-cloud-b" fill="#475569" opacity="0.95" cx="118" cy="27" rx="20" ry="13" />

  <line id="identity-19-storm-rain" stroke="#38bdf8" stroke-width="2" x1="86" y1="45" x2="78" y2="65" />
  <circle id="variant-19-dot" fill="#0284c7" opacity="0.72" cx="45" cy="23" r="2.6" />
  <line id="variant-19-rule" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.58" x1="51" y1="26" x2="67" y2="24" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-01" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="9" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-02" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="46" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-03" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="77" y="4" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />

  <rect id="variant-19-chip-05" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="145" y="6" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-06" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="182" y="4" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-07" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="9" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-08" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="46" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-09" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.68" x="77" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-10" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.68" x="114" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-11" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.68" x="145" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-19-chip-12" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.68" x="182" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-01" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.66" cx="21" cy="26" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-02" fill="#84cc16" opacity="0.66" cx="206" cy="40" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-03" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.66" cx="31" cy="54" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-04" fill="#14b8a6" opacity="0.66" cx="192" cy="68" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-05" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.66" cx="17" cy="82" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-06" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.66" cx="202" cy="96" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-07" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="27" cy="110" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-19-pin-08" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="212" cy="124" r="2.3" />
  <polyline id="stray-pier-rope" fill="none" stroke="#f8fafc" stroke-width="2" points="8,84 20,80 32,84" />
</svg>
